title: Azure Messaging Services Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Azure messaging services with this quiz!

cards.question: Which Azure service is designed for enterprise-grade messaging with queues and topics?
Which Azure messaging service supports transactions and dead-letter queues?
Which Azure service is best for ingesting millions of telemetry events per second?
Which Azure service uses a push model to deliver events to subscribers?
Which Azure queue service is part of Azure Storage?
Which Azure service supports publish-subscribe messaging using topics and subscriptions?
Which Azure service is designed for event streaming similar to Apache Kafka?
Which Azure service automatically routes events from Azure resources to handlers?
Which Azure messaging service guarantees FIFO ordering using sessions?
Which Azure messaging service is the cheapest simple queue option?
Which Azure service allows multiple consumers to read the same event stream independently?
Which Azure messaging service supports dead-letter queues for failed messages?
Which Azure service is typically used for reacting to blob storage events?
Which Azure service supports consumer groups?
Which Azure messaging service uses partitions for scalability?
Which Azure messaging service allows message deferral?
Which Azure service integrates with Azure Functions for event-driven architecture?
Which Azure messaging service is limited to 64KB messages?
Which Azure messaging service supports AMQP protocol?
Which Azure event streaming service can expose a Kafka-compatible endpoint?
Which Azure service is best suited for IoT telemetry ingestion?
Which Azure messaging service is commonly used for microservice communication with reliability?
Which Azure event service delivers events via webhooks?

Which Azure queue service requires polling by consumers?

Which Azure service supports topic-based message routing with SQL filters?

Which Azure event service automatically integrates with many Azure resources?
Which Azure queue option is the simplest for basic background tasks?
Which Azure service allows message batching for efficiency?
Which Azure service supports millions of events per second throughput?
Which Azure service supports event schema validation and filtering?
Which Azure service requires manual scaling through queue throughput management?

Which Azure service can buffer streaming data before analytics processing?

Which Azure service supports duplicate detection windows?
Which Azure service supports multiple partitions for throughput scaling?
Which Azure service provides event delivery retries automatically?
Which Azure service supports up to millions of queued messages cheaply?
